name: SDD Git Commit
description: Orchestrates a professional SDD Git commit workflow — hygiene checks, SDD gates, CHANGELOG updates, and Conventional Commits.
author: kimcharli

commands.name: commit
commands.description: Professional SDD Git commit — checks hygiene, syncs specs, updates CHANGELOG

features: Hygiene check — prevents accidental commit of secrets/junk
SDD Gate — ensures source code and specs remain in parity
Automatic CHANGELOG, TODO, and Session Memo tracking
Post-commit reflection and lessons learned capture
